Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class ErsapShell.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.ErsapShell.Builder
Enclosing class:
ErsapShell
public static class ErsapShell.Builder extends Object
Helps configuring and creating a new ErsapShell.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(org.jline.terminal.TerminalBuilder termBuilder)
      Creates a new builder.
      Parameters:
      termBuilder - the builder of the virtual terminal

  • Method Details

    • withConfiguration

      public ErsapShell.Builder withConfiguration(Consumer<Config.Builder> consumer)
      Customizes the configuration variables of the shell session.
      Parameters:
      consumer - a function that updates the configuration builder
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withRunSubCommand

      public ErsapShell.Builder withRunSubCommand(CommandFactory factory)
      Adds a new subcommand to the run builtin command. This new subcommand cannot have the same name as one of the default subcommands.
      Parameters:
      factory - the factory to create the subcommand
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withEditSubCommand

      public ErsapShell.Builder withEditSubCommand(String name, String description, Function<Config,Path> fileArg)
      Adds a new subcommand to the edit builtin command.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the subcommand
      description - the help description for the command
      fileArg - the path to the text file to be edited
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withBuiltinCommand

      public ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(String name, String description, List<String> command)
      Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session. This new command cannot have the same name as one of the default builtin commands.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the command
      description - the help description for the command
      command - the list containing the program and its arguments
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withBuiltinCommand

      public ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(String name, String description, String... command)
      Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session. This new command cannot have the same name as one of the default builtin commands.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the command
      description - the help description for the command
      command - a string array containing the program and its arguments
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withBuiltinCommand

      public ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(CommandFactory factory)
      Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session. This new command cannot have the same name as one of the default builtin commands.
      Parameters:
      factory - the factory to create the command
      Returns:
      this builder

    • withScript

      public ErsapShell.Builder withScript(Path script)
      Sets the script to be executed by the shell in non-interactive mode.
      Parameters:
      script - the script with commands to be executed by the shell
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public ErsapShell build()
      Creates the user-interactive ERSAP shell instance.
      Returns:
      the created shell
